title: coelogyne dolichobrachia
intro: Coelogyne dolichobrachia, also known as the Long-bracted Coelogyne, is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. It is a type of flowering plant used in traditional medicine, valued for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Coelogyne dolichobrachia are said to include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wounds and skin conditions. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's roots are often extracted and used in infusions or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
